TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_szy_Cyan_Sno, title = Cyan_Sno, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Sakizaya]}, url = {https://szy.wikipedia.org/wiki/Cyan_Sno} }

S.FORM: Cyan Sno (Amilika a kamu: Jon Snow) u wawa ni Leyka Takelian aci Liana Stak, u cacay tada a wawa nu heni. i nunisulitan a cudad, i nu saayaway sa, u pucud a wawa ni Etad Stak aci Katelin Stak hananay. u masakapahay i "u dadiw nu Sulda atu lamal" ya tilibi a kungku hananay. mabalaki nida ci Cyan Sno atu calekaka nida (niza)(wawa ni Etad Stakaci aci Katelin Stak). nika azih han (nikaadihan) ku kawaw atu wayway nida laylay nikauzip (nikaudip) nikapatay nida (niza) na lmkamuwan nida (niza) laluma'an Alya Stak (Amilika a kamu : Arya Stark)u wawa nu mikeliday nu Kasienawan ci Edad aci Katelin, u sakatulu a wawa nu heni. u siwaay a mihcaan i "dadiw nu Sulda atu lamal" ya tilibi a kungku hanany. izaw (idaw) ku tatulu a kaka nida, u kakaay ci Lab, u saba ci Plan aci Licon, izaw (idaw) aca ku cacayya a kakana ci Sansa, izaw(idaw) aca ku cacay a kaka nu caay kalecad a ina ci Cyan Snu. mahida tu calekakaay nida, sawsawni misimpi tu Alya, ina simpa sa, malacacayay a masuldaay a wolf. izaw ku cacay a masuldaay a wolf, u ngangan nida namakay u saicelangay milpacaw a tatayna nu Luinaay ci Namelia. == malalitin tu ihekaay atu zumaay (dumaay) a nikatinengan ==
S.PHON: ¶jan sno (amir~…æika a kamu: *on snow) u wawa ni r~…æ…ôka tak…ôr~…æian a ¶i r~…æiana stak, u ¶a ¶aj tada a wawa nu ƒß…ôni. i nunisur~…æitan a ¶udad, i nu saajawaj sa, u pu ¶ud a wawa ni …ôtad stak a ¶i kat…ôr~…æin stak ƒßananaj. u masakapaƒßaj i "u dadiw nu sur~…æda atu r~…æamar~…æ" ja tir~…æibi a ku≈ãku ƒßananaj. mabar~…æaki nida ¶i ¶jan sno atu ¶ar~…æ…ôkaka nida (niza)(wawa ni …ôtad staka ¶i a ¶i kat…ôr~…æin stak). nika aziƒß ƒßan (nikaadiƒßan) ku kawaw atu wajwaj nida r~…æajr~…æaj nikauzip (nikaudip) nikapataj nida (niza) na r~…æmkamuwan nida (niza) r~…æar~…æuma î~ °an ar~…æja stak (amir~…æika a kamu : arja stark)u wawa nu mik…ôr~…æidaj nu kasi…ônawan ¶i …ôdad a ¶i kat…ôr~…æin, u sakatur~…æu a wawa nu ƒß…ôni. u siwaaj a miƒß ¶aan i "dadiw nu sur~…æda atu r~…æamar~…æ" ja tir~…æibi a ku≈ãku ƒßananj. izaw (idaw) ku tatur~…æu a kaka nida, u kakaaj ¶i r~…æab, u saba ¶i pr~…æan a ¶i r~…æi ¶on, izaw (idaw) a ¶a ku ¶a ¶ajja a kakana ¶i sansa, izaw(idaw) a ¶a ku ¶a ¶aj a kaka nu ¶aaj kar~…æ…ô ¶ad a ina ¶i ¶jan snu. maƒßida tu ¶ar~…æ…ôkakaaj nida, sawsawni misimpi tu ar~…æja, ina simpa sa, mar~…æa ¶a ¶ajaj a masur~…ædaaj a wor~…æf. izaw ku ¶a ¶aj a masur~…ædaaj a wor~…æf, u ≈ãa≈ãan nida namakaj u sai ¶…ôr~…æa≈ãaj mir~…æpa ¶aw a tatajna nu r~…æuinaaj ¶i nam…ôr~…æia. == mar~…æar~…æitin tu iƒß…ôkaaj atu zumaaj (dumaaj) a nikatin…ô≈ãan ==
S.FORM: Cyan Sno (Amilika a kamu: Jon Snow) u wawa ni Leyka Takelian aci Liana Stak, u cacay tada a wawa nu heni. i nunisulitan a cudad, i nu saayaway sa, u pucud a wawa ni Etad Stak aci Katelin Stak hananay. u masakapahay i "u dadiw nu Sulda atu lamal" ya tilibi a kungku hananay. mabalaki nida ci Cyan Sno atu calekaka nida (niza)(wawa ni Etad Stakaci aci Katelin Stak). nika azih han (nikaadihan) ku kawaw atu wayway nida laylay nikauzip (nikaudip) nikapatay nida (niza) na lmkamuwan nida (niza) laluma'an Alya Stak (Amilika a kamu : Arya Stark)u wawa nu mikeliday nu Kasienawan ci Edad aci Katelin, u sakatulu a wawa nu heni. u siwaay a mihcaan i "dadiw nu Sulda atu lamal" ya tilibi a kungku hanany. izaw (idaw) ku tatulu a kaka nida, u kakaay ci Lab, u saba ci Plan aci Licon, izaw (idaw) aca ku cacayya a kakana ci Sansa, izaw(idaw) aca ku cacay a kaka nu caay kalecad a ina ci Cyan Snu. mahida tu calekakaay nida, sawsawni misimpi tu Alya, ina simpa sa, malacacayay a masuldaay a wolf. izaw ku cacay a masuldaay a wolf, u ngangan nida namakay u saicelangay milpacaw a tatayna nu Luinaay ci Namelia. == malalitin tu ihekaay atu zumaay (dumaay) a nikatinengan ==
S.PHON: ¶jan sno (amir~…æika a kamu: *on snow) u wawa ni r~…æ…ôka tak…ôr~…æian a ¶i r~…æiana stak, u ¶a ¶aj tada a wawa nu ƒß…ôni. i nunisur~…æitan a ¶udad, i nu saajawaj sa, u pu ¶ud a wawa ni …ôtad stak a ¶i kat…ôr~…æin stak ƒßananaj. u masakapaƒßaj i "u dadiw nu sur~…æda atu r~…æamar~…æ" ja tir~…æibi a ku≈ãku ƒßananaj. mabar~…æaki nida ¶i ¶jan sno atu ¶ar~…æ…ôkaka nida (niza)(wawa ni …ôtad staka ¶i a ¶i kat…ôr~…æin stak). nika aziƒß ƒßan (nikaadiƒßan) ku kawaw atu wajwaj nida r~…æajr~…æaj nikauzip (nikaudip) nikapataj nida (niza) na r~…æmkamuwan nida (niza) r~…æar~…æuma î~ °an ar~…æja stak (amir~…æika a kamu : arja stark)u wawa nu mik…ôr~…æidaj nu kasi…ônawan ¶i …ôdad a ¶i kat…ôr~…æin, u sakatur~…æu a wawa nu ƒß…ôni. u siwaaj a miƒß ¶aan i "dadiw nu sur~…æda atu r~…æamar~…æ" ja tir~…æibi a ku≈ãku ƒßananj. izaw (idaw) ku tatur~…æu a kaka nida, u kakaaj ¶i r~…æab, u saba ¶i pr~…æan a ¶i r~…æi ¶on, izaw (idaw) a ¶a ku ¶a ¶ajja a kakana ¶i sansa, izaw(idaw) a ¶a ku ¶a ¶aj a kaka nu ¶aaj kar~…æ…ô ¶ad a ina ¶i ¶jan snu. maƒßida tu ¶ar~…æ…ôkakaaj nida, sawsawni misimpi tu ar~…æja, ina simpa sa, mar~…æa ¶a ¶ajaj a masur~…ædaaj a wor~…æf. izaw ku ¶a ¶aj a masur~…ædaaj a wor~…æf, u ≈ãa≈ãan nida namakaj u sai ¶…ôr~…æa≈ãaj mir~…æpa ¶aw a tatajna nu r~…æuinaaj ¶i nam…ôr~…æia. == mar~…æar~…æitin tu iƒß…ôkaaj atu zumaaj (dumaaj) a nikatin…ô≈ãan ==
